post.summary: Grant a student access to a course
Create an organization and make it active
Register an asset and get a presigned upload URL
Confirm an upload completed (captures size + content type)

delete.summary: Delete an asset (removes the object from storage)

post.summary: Get a short-lived presigned URL to download/serve an asset

get.summary: Serve an asset inline (redirects to a fresh presigned URL)
List apps the current user has authorized

delete.summary: Revoke a connected app's access token

get.summary: List the integrations this deployment supports, with their config schemas

post.summary: Connect an integration (stores its secrets encrypted)

patch.summary: Change a connection's configuration or active flag

delete.summary: Disconnect an integration (destroys its stored secrets)
